introSection: Flucht von Novgorod (formerly Fluch von Novgorod) is a steel launched roller coaster located at Hansa-Park in Sierksdorf, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany. Opened in April 2009, it is a custom Euro-Fighter from Gerstlauer.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: Flucht von Novgorod is German for Escape from Novgorod. Fluch von Novgorod is German for Curse of Novgorod. Novgorod is a city in Russia.

fullText:
Flucht von Novgorod (formerly Fluch von Novgorod) is a steel launched roller coaster located at Hansa-Park in Sierksdorf, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany. Opened in April 2009, it is a custom Euro-Fighter from Gerstlauer.





Flucht von Novgorod is German for Escape from Novgorod. Fluch von Novgorod is German for Curse of Novgorod. Novgorod is a city in Russia.
